title: 強く気高い“ヒシアマゾン”に

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By chance, Hishi Amazon catches Narita Brian
and Symboli Rudolf together on a partner run.
Their intensity has a strong impact on her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, she competes in a scrimmage,
but her mind is still on Brian. She loses the race,
immensely frustrated by her shortcomings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She yearns for the strength to compete on Brian's
level, and decides that she'll conquer the Triple
Tiara—just as Brian takes on the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then finally, they'll have their one-on-one at
the year-end Arima Kinen. Goal in mind, Hishi
Amazon sets her sights on the Oka Sho.
